nativeThreading: KERNEL32 threads/synchronization plus compiler-emitted x64 lock-prefixed atomics, TLS, affinity
nativeSockets: Namespaced raw WinSock2 imports plus typed TCP, UDP, DNS, poll, and nonblocking socket objects
nativeFileSystem: KERNEL32 UTF-8 file and directory operations with typed LSX byte/text results
nativeJson: LSX-native JSON parser, DOM, builder, serializer, and file loading/saving
nativeLogging: Thread-safe flushed text logs plus compiler-generated lifecycle/crash logs
nativeImages: Direct stb_image C API through Graphics/STBImage.lsx; Texture2D allocates an annotation-free packed u8 buffer, copies decoded RGBA bytes once, uploads through the same OpenGL path as example 04, preserves row order by default, and exposes explicit flipped loaders for bottom-left UV layouts
nativeSdfFonts: Direct FreeType C API declarations plus a thin glyph-slot bridge; FreeType performs font loading, kerning, rasterization, and SDF rendering, while Font.lsx stores atlas pixels in an annotation-free packed u8 buffer
nativeTextureUpload: Standard OpenGL glTexImage2D for RGBA byte-buffer uploads; packed Windows x64 helper retained for FreeType single-channel atlas uploads
nativeGLM: GLM 1.0.2 wrapped behind LSXMath.dll with LSX-first Vec2/Vec3/Vec4, Mat2/Mat3/Mat4, quaternion, dual-quaternion, transform, projection, decomposition, camera, and OpenGL uniform APIs
nativeCameraMath: Typed perspective/orthographic camera wrapper with RH/LH and NO/ZO projection choices; native pointers remain confined to GLMRaw.lsx
nativeLazyUI: Inline LSHTML/LSCSS declarations lower to retained LSX element functions; LSCSS supports direct {var} expressions. LazyUI includes real UTF-8 text inputs and multiline textareas, caret/selection/clipboard editing, password masking, checkboxes, radios, switches, ranges, color values, mouse-wheel and draggable scrollbars, editor/game controls, events, flex/grid/absolute layout, and declarative canvas elements. Future LSHTMLRunner/ECS attachment metadata is present without exposing pointers in user LSX.
lazyUIRenderer: OpenGL 4.6 retained UI renderer using ordinary flat LSX instance tables. Panels, control parts, visible scrollbars, SDF glyphs, and images remain batched; boxes and glyphs use four-corner GL_TRIANGLE_STRIP instancing, images use texture-grouped base-instance draws, and grow-only GPU buffers update through glBufferSubData. Analytical rounded corners, borders, outlines, shadows, CSS gradients, clipping, and transparent retained submission remain supported.
lazyUICanvas: Declarative LSHTML canvas elements for rectangles, circles, ellipses, lines, triangles, polygons, polylines, paths, text, and images. Fill, stroke, borders, radii, shadows, opacity, transforms, and gradients come from LSCSS; the low-level retained CanvasContext remains a compatibility backend.
